packageRules.description: Chunk K16/K17: @paradigm/* are first-party platform packages. Every bump must (1) run the consumer contract tests -- the `contracts` CI job runs on every PR, and Renovate bumps ARE PRs, so this is automatic -- and (2) NEVER auto-merge. Each @paradigm/* bump is Tier-3 and Drew reviews it (AC-CARDS-015 / AC-CI-005). K17 reshapes this into the full @paradigm/*-bump review gate; until then this rule is the floor that keeps auto-merge off.
